targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  decision_status AS `Décision`,
  skip_reason AS `Raison de skip`,
  edge AS `Edge`,
  limit_price AS `Prix limite`,
  source_ok AS `Source OK`,
  orderbook_ok AS `Carnet OK`,
  risk_ok AS `Risque OK`,
  blocker AS `Blocage`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  skip_reason AS `Raison de skip`,
  count() AS `Nombre`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
  AND decision_status NOT IN ('trade', 'trade_small')
GROUP BY `Raison de skip`
ORDER BY `Nombre` DESC

SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  run_id AS `Run / exécution`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  token_id AS `Token`,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  decision_status AS `Décision`,
  skip_reason AS `Raison de skip`,
  edge AS `Edge`,
  limit_price AS `Prix limite`,
  source_ok AS `Source OK`,
  orderbook_ok AS `Carnet OK`,
  risk_ok AS `Risque OK`,
  blocker AS `Blocage`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
list.label: Run / exécution
